играет

languages.text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"
languages.original_text: [Подать знак Экзальту-117] "Аккуратная подготовка к бою — это разумно, верно?"

traits.locale_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"
[Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"
[Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

languages.text: 【向尊使-117示意】“精心备战是明智的选择，不是吗？”
languages.original_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: 【向尊使-117示意】“精心备战是明智的选择，不是吗？”

languages.text: [Faire un geste vers Exalt-117] « Il vaudrait sans doute mieux procéder à des préparatifs prudents, non ? »
languages.original_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: [Faire un geste vers Exalt-117] « Il vaudrait sans doute mieux procéder à des préparatifs prudents, non ? »

languages.text: [Dar la señal a Exaltado-117] «Una preparación cautelosa es algo sensato, ¿no?».
languages.original_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: [Dar la señal a Exaltado-117] «Una preparación cautelosa es algo sensato, ¿no?».

languages.text: [Yüce-117'yi işaret et] "Mantıklı olan, savaş için dikkatlice hazırlık yapmaktır. Öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: [Yüce-117'yi işaret et] "Mantıklı olan, savaş için dikkatlice hazırlık yapmaktır. Öyle değil mi?"

languages.text: [Exalt-117 ein Zeichen geben] "Eine sorgfältige Vorbereitung auf die Schlacht ist vernünftig, oder?"
languages.original_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: [Exalt-117 ein Zeichen geben] "Eine sorgfältige Vorbereitung auf die Schlacht ist vernünftig, oder?"

languages.text: [エクセルト117への信号] 「戦いの準備はしっかりしておくべきだね」
languages.original_text: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"

traits.locale_text: [エクセルト117への信号] 「戦いの準備はしっかりしておくべきだね」
